content.question: What share of Poland's observed PISA gains following the 1999 reform (extending comprehensive education) can be attributed to the structural change itself versus concurrent curriculum reform, teacher professional development, economic growth, or selection into higher education?
content.reduction_path: Obtain and meta-analyze published econometric decompositions of the 1999 Polish reform; if none exist, conduct a synthetic cohort comparison using PISA micro-data (if available) to isolate the track-structure effect from other policy changes implemented in the same period. Document the timing and content of parallel non-structural reforms.
